# BOOM Rome

> BOOM is a premium mid-term apartment rental platform and agency for Rome, built for international tenants — expats, international students and remote workers. It is part portal, part agency: video-verified listings plus a human team that finds, verifies, negotiates and manages the entire rental. Tenants move in within 48 hours, with transparent all-in pricing, English contracts and zero hidden fees. Operated by Egidi Immobiliare S.r.l., a registered Italian agency.

## What BOOM does
- Verified apartment listings with video tours, building-exact map positions and transparent, all-inclusive pricing.
- 48-hour move-in from approval, a 2-minute online eligibility check, and 24/7 WhatsApp support in English.
- Legal contracts registered with the Agenzia delle Entrate, deposit protection, and utilities set up before arrival.
- A fully digital rental pipeline: online pre-agreement with typed e-signature → Stripe-secured payment → registered contract signed online (Magic Sign) → tenant portal for payments and documents.

## How renting with BOOM works
1. Browse verified homes at https://www.boomrome.com/apartments — filter by zone (tap-to-select), budget and move-in date; every price is computed to the euro (rent, deposit, agency fee of 10% of annual rent).
2. Explore each home on the Skyline 3D map: real satellite imagery of Rome, 3D buildings, an orbit around the actual block, one-tap Google Street View, and live distances to Termini, Colosseo, the Vatican and the universities.
3. Pass the 60-second eligibility check (income or guarantor); serious applicants receive a pre-agreement they can read, sign and pay online via Stripe — a €300 refundable hold locks a home.
4. Occupied portfolio homes can be reserved ahead via waitlist — BOOM homes often rent months in advance.

## Services
- [Apartments](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments): Browse video-verified mid-term rentals in Rome, with the Skyline 3D satellite map.
- [How It Works](https://www.boomrome.com/how-it-works): The 7-step process from first click to keys in hand.
- [Property Finding](https://www.boomrome.com/property-finding): We find and negotiate your apartment for €350 (deducted from the agency fee, refundable if no match), including off-market properties.
- [Virtual Viewing](https://www.boomrome.com/virtual-viewing): Live video apartment tours with HD photos and an honest report including red flags. €89, one-tap Stripe checkout, scheduled within 48 hours, works for any Rome listing from any portal. Credited to the agency fee if you rent through BOOM.
- [Deal Assistance](https://www.boomrome.com/deal-assistance): Clause-by-clause contract review in English, landlord/ownership verification and price negotiation for an apartment you found yourself. €249, first review within 24 hours; the average client saves €600+ in negotiation.
- [Concierge](https://www.boomrome.com/concierge): End-to-end relocation support — codice fiscale (remotely, before arrival), utilities, SIM, residence registration, healthcare enrollment. Quoted per move (full landing typically from €390, single tasks from €15), one dedicated human on WhatsApp for the first month.
- [Canone Concordato calculator](https://www.boomrome.com/canone): Free calculator for Rome's regulated-rent brackets — for landlords and tenants.

## Neighbourhood guides (renting in each Rome zone)
- [Trastevere](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/trastevere): cobbled lanes, evening life, John Cabot University nearby.
- [Centro Storico](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/centro-storico): Pantheon, Navona, the historic heart.
- [Monti](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/monti): artisan quarter ten minutes from the Colosseum.
- [Prati](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/prati): elegant streets by the Vatican; LUMSA nearby.
- [Pigneto](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/pigneto): Rome's creative quarter.
- [Testaccio](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/testaccio): the food quarter Romans keep for themselves.
- [Ostiense](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/ostiense): street art and Roma Tre university.
- [San Lorenzo](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/san-lorenzo): student quarter next to Sapienza.
- [Trieste & Coppedè](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/trieste-coppede): Liberty villas, calm residential streets, close to LUISS.
- [Esquilino](https://www.boomrome.com/apartments-in/esquilino): Rome at its most international.

## Universities BOOM serves (distances shown on every listing)
LUISS Guido Carli (Viale Romania), Sapienza (San Lorenzo/Tiburtina), Roma Tre (Ostiense), John Cabot University (Trastevere), LUMSA (Prati/Borgo). The apartments map threads live distances from every home to these campuses plus Termini, Colosseo and the Vatican.

## Who it is for
International tenants moving to Rome for the medium term (1 to 12+ months): expats, international students (LUISS, Sapienza, John Cabot, Roma Tre, LUMSA), remote workers and relocating professionals who cannot navigate Rome's rental market in Italian.

## Key facts
- Coverage: Rome, Italy — Trastevere, Centro Storico, Monti, Prati, Trieste/Coppedè, Pigneto, Testaccio, Ostiense, San Lorenzo, Esquilino, Parioli, Flaminio, Ponte Milvio, Marconi, Conca d'Oro, Tiburtina.
- Move-in speed: as fast as 48 hours from approval.
- Pricing: transparent — monthly rent + refundable deposit + agency fee of 10% of annual rent; no hidden costs. €300 refundable hold to lock a home.
- Payments: Stripe-secured. Contracts: registered, English-language, signed online.
- Reviews: 4.9/5 on Google (47 reviews).
- Language: English-first service.
- Company: Egidi Immobiliare S.r.l., P.IVA 17322991005, Rome, Italy.
